stories.headline: ChatGPT now has a Lockdown Mode that blocks prompt injection leaks
stories.blurb: OpenAI launched Lockdown Mode to stop attackers from tricking ChatGPT into spilling sensitive data through prompt injection. The feature won't prevent all attacks, but it's designed to keep your private information from leaking even when someone tries to hijack the conversation with hidden instructions.
stories.why_it_matters: Prompt injection is one of the biggest real-world risks in AI apps—this is OpenAI's first serious defense.
stories.original_headline: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks

stories.headline: Cursor now lets you draw UI changes instead of describing them
stories.blurb: Design Mode in Cursor's browser lets you click elements, draw boxes, or use voice to show agents what UI changes you want. Instead of writing 'move that button left and make it blue,' you point and sketch.
stories.why_it_matters: Visual feedback is faster than text when tweaking interfaces—especially for non-coders.

stories.headline: Hackers tricked Instagram's AI support bot into handing over 20,000 accounts
stories.blurb: Attackers exploited Meta's AI-powered customer support system to hijack Instagram accounts, including those belonging to the White House, US Space Force, and security researchers. Meta confirmed around 20,000 accounts were compromised through the AI bot before the company patched the vulnerability.
stories.why_it_matters: AI support systems can become attack vectors when they have account-level permissions.
stories.original_headline: Hackers tricked Instagram AI into letting them take over 20,000 accounts [U]

try_this_prompt.title: The hiring red-flag detector
try_this_prompt.prompt: I'm interviewing candidates for a role. I'll describe the position and what I'm looking for below. Give me three questions that will expose misalignment fast — not softball culture-fit stuff, but questions where a bad answer means we're done. Then tell me the one green flag I'm probably not asking about.
try_this_prompt.tool_hint: Before you waste three rounds on someone who looked great on paper.

daily_question: If you could lock down ONE AI feature you use daily—like ChatGPT's new mode—what would it protect you from?

args.reason: Shipped security feature addressing real prompt injection vulnerabilities - developers can enable this today. Concrete capability improvement that makes AI agents safer to deploy with sensitive data.

agent_trace.result_summary: {"ok": true, "picked": "OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks", "persona": "build", "pick_count": 1}
